args.Message:
"
Here is the complete analysis of all requested files.

---

## 1. `/nodes/index.ts` — Exported Nodes (15 lines)

```ts
export { default as BpmnTaskNode } from './BpmnTaskNode';
export { default as BpmnSubprocessNode } from './BpmnSubprocessNode';
export {
  BpmnStartEventNode,
  BpmnIntermediateEventNode,
  BpmnEndEventNode,
} from './BpmnEventNode';
export { default as BpmnGatewayNode } from './BpmnGatewayNode';
export { default as BpmnDataObjectNode } from './BpmnDataObjectNode';
export { default as BpmnDataStoreNode } from './BpmnDataStoreNode';
export { default as BpmnAnnotationNode } from './BpmnAnnotationNode';
export { default as BpmnGroupNode } from './BpmnGroupNode';
export { default as BpmnPoolNode } from './BpmnPoolNode';
export { default as BpmnLaneNode } from './BpmnLaneNode';
```

**All exported nodes:**
- `BpmnTaskNode`
- `BpmnSubprocessNode`
- `BpmnStartEventNode`, `BpmnIntermediateEventNode`, `BpmnEndEventNode` (from one file)
- `BpmnGatewayNode`
- `BpmnDataObjectNode`
- `BpmnDataStoreNode`
- `BpmnAnnotationNode`
- `BpmnGroupNode`
- `BpmnPoolNode`
- `BpmnLaneNode`

---

## 2. Node Folder Structure (14 files, 0 subdirs)

```
nodes/
├── BpmnAnnotationNode.tsx   (675 B)
├── BpmnDataNode.tsx         (416 B)   ← unused/internal, NOT exported from index.ts
├── BpmnDataObjectNode.tsx   (1072 B)
├── BpmnDataStoreNode.tsx    (1245 B)
├── BpmnEventNode.tsx        (1867 B)  ← exports 3 named nodes
├── BpmnGatewayNode.tsx      (1645 B)
├── BpmnGroupNode.tsx        (733 B)
├── BpmnLaneNode.tsx         (857 B)
├── BpmnPoolNode.tsx         (947 B)
├── BpmnResizableNode.tsx    (1562 B)  ← shared base wrapper
├── BpmnSubprocessNode.tsx   (955 B)
├── BpmnTaskNode.tsx         (706 B)
├── helpers.tsx              (3020 B)  ← shared utilities
└── index.ts                 (682 B)
```

Note: `BpmnDataNode.tsx` exists but is NOT exported from `index.ts`.

content:
Created At: 2026-05-26T03:43:42Z
Completed At: 2026-05-26T03:43:42Z
Message sent to "d322bd31-842d-4b0e-bb4f-89231525f363".

All findings have been sent to the main agent. Here's a quick recap of what was gathered:

**Node Folder:** 14 files — 11 node components, 1 shared base wrapper (`BpmnResizableNode.tsx`), 1 helpers file, and 1 index.

**Key architecture:**
- Every node wraps content in `BpmnResizableNode` (except `BpmnLaneNode` and `BpmnDataNode`)
- All styling is centralized in `helpers.tsx` via `getBpmnNodeClassName(kind, selected)`
- **Selection state** is indicated by two mechanisms:
  1. `ring-2 ring-ring/40` CSS class on the inner div (via `getBpmnNodeClassName`)
  2. `<NodeResizer>` + resize handle controls appear (via `BpmnResizableNode`)
- Event nodes skip `getBpmnNodeClassName` entirely — they only get the resizer on select, no ring
- `BpmnLaneNode` has no `BpmnResizableNode` wrapper and cannot be resized
